profile.name: MAX2870
profile.description: 23.5MHz to 6000MHz Fractional/Integer-N Synthesizer/VCO with integrated VCOs, dual differential RF outputs, 4-wire SPI, 32-pin TQFN

key_performance.output_power_range: −4dBm to +5dBm in 3dB steps, each output independently controlled
key_performance.outputs: Dual differential open-collector: RFOUTA± and RFOUTB±. RFOUTB selectable as divided or VCO fundamental (BDIV bit)
key_performance.interface: 4-wire SPI: CLK, DATA, LE (write); MUX_OUT for Reg6 readback

pins.name: CLK
pins.description: Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI master clock. Min clock period 50ns (tCL=25ns low, tCH=25ns high). Compatible with 1.8V logic.

pins.name: DATA
pins.description: Serial Data Input. Loaded MSB first; the 3 LSBs identify the register address.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI MOSI. tDS=25ns setup and tDH=25ns hold relative to rising CLK edge.

pins.name: LE
pins.description: Load Enable. Rising edge latches shift register contents into the addressed register.
pins.requirements: Connect to SPI CS (active-high latch). tLES=20ns setup, tLEH=10ns hold, tLEW=20ns min pulse-width.

pins.name: CE
pins.description: Chip Enable. Logic-low powers down the device; charge pump goes high-impedance. All blocks except SPI are off in low-power mode.
pins.requirements: Pull high for normal operation. After CE returns high, wait ≥20ms before programming registers.

pins.name: SW
pins.description: Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to loop filter mid-point (between R2A and R2B) when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal operation.
pins.requirements: Leave unconnected (NC) in normal mode. For fast-lock: split loop filter shunt resistor into R2A (¼ total) and R2B (¾ total); connect SW to their junction. Set CDM=01 in Reg3.

pins.name: VCC_CP
pins.description: Power Supply for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps as close as possible to pin. Star routing from central VCC node recommended.

pins.name: CP_OUT
pins.description: Charge-Pump Output. Current-source/sink output that drives the external loop filter.
pins.requirements: Connect to loop filter input (C3 shunt cap, then R3+C1||R2, then C2 to TUNE). Keep trace short. Tri-stated when TRI=1 (Reg2 bit4).

pins.name: GND_CP
pins.description: Ground for Charge Pump.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP). Each GND_ pin routes independently to the ground plane.

pins.name: GND_PLL
pins.description: Ground for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_PLL
pins.description: Power Supply for PLL.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Separate LDO recommended for best performance. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: GND_RF
pins.description: Ground for RF Outputs.
pins.requirements: Connect to PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: RFOUTA_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Differential output. Output power set by APWR[1:0] in Reg4: 00=−4dBm, 01=−1dBm, 10=+2dBm, 11=+5dBm.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF. Enable with RFA_EN (Reg4 bit5)=1 and RFOUT_EN pin high. If unused: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTA_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Differential complement of RFOUTA_P.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF. If unused: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_P
pins.description: Open Collector Positive RF Output B. BDIV=0 (Reg4 bit9): same frequency as RFOUTA. BDIV=1: VCO fundamental frequency.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF. Enable with RFB_EN (Reg4 bit8)=1. If unused: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: RFOUTB_N
pins.description: Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Differential complement of RFOUTB_P.
pins.requirements: Bias via 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF. If unused: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

pins.name: VCC_RF
pins.description: Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers. Also serves as DC bias supply for all four open-collector RF output pins via 27nH RF chokes.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Separate LDO recommended. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: VCC_VCO
pins.description: VCO Power Supply.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Decoupling caps must connect to the analog ground plane (not digital) for best phase noise. Use 100nF + 1µF.

pins.name: GND_VCO
pins.description: Ground for VCO.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: NOISE_FILT
pins.description: VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias node requiring external decoupling.
pins.requirements: Place 1µF capacitor to GND as close as possible to pin. Mandatory — omitting degrades VCO phase noise significantly.

pins.name: TUNE
pins.description: VCO Control Voltage Input. Connected to the output of the external loop filter. Compliance range 0.5V–2.5V. Internal 3-bit ADC monitors this voltage for VCO autoselect.
pins.requirements: Connect to loop filter output node (not directly to CP_OUT). ADC codes 000 (VTUNE<0.5V) and 111 (VTUNE>2.5V) indicate out-of-lock.

pins.name: GND_TUNE
pins.description: Ground for VCO Control Input.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: RSET
pins.description: Charge-Pump Current Range Input. External resistor to GND sets CP current: ICP = 1.63V/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
pins.requirements: Connect resistor 2.7kΩ–10kΩ to GND. Typical 5.1kΩ: ICP_min=0.32mA (CP=0000), ICP_max=5.12mA (CP=1111). Do not leave floating.

pins.name: BIAS_FILT
pins.description: VCO Bias Filter. Internal VCO bias decoupling node.
pins.requirements: Place 1µF capacitor to GND as close as possible to pin. Mandatory — omitting degrades VCO phase noise.

pins.name: REG
pins.description: Reference Voltage Compensation. Internal bandgap reference decoupling node.
pins.requirements: Place 1µF capacitor to GND as close as possible to pin. Mandatory.

pins.name: LD
pins.description: Lock Detect Output. Behaviour set by LD[1:0] in Reg5 bits 23:22. 01=digital lock detect (push-pull), 10=analog lock detect (open-drain), 00=always low, 11=always high.
pins.requirements: For digital LD (LD=01): connect to MCU GPIO. For analog LD (LD=10): add 10kΩ pull-up to VCC — output is open-drain. VOH=VCC−0.4V at 0.3mA, VOL=0.4V at 0.3mA.

pins.name: RFOUT_EN
pins.description: RF Output Enable (hardware). Logic-low disables both RFOUTA and RFOUTB regardless of register settings.
pins.requirements: Pull high for normal RF output operation. Keep low during register init sequence; enable outputs only after second complete programming pass. Per-output control also via RFA_EN (Reg4 bit5) and RFB_EN (Reg4 bit8).

pins.name: GND_DIG
pins.description: Ground for Digital Circuitry.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_DIG
pins.description: Power Supply for Digital Circuitry. Also sets the internal bias level VCC_DIG/2 for the REF_IN input.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: REF_IN
pins.description: Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter with internal DC bias at VCC_DIG/2. Range 10–200MHz (100MHz max with doubler). High-impedance in shutdown.
pins.requirements: Must be AC-coupled (internal bias at VCC_DIG/2). Min sensitivity 0.7×VCC_DIG Vpp. Input capacitance 2pF, input current ±60µA.

pins.name: MUX_OUT
pins.description: Multiplexed Output / Serial Data Out. Function set by MUX[3:0] (Reg2 bits 28:26 + Reg5 bit18 MSB). Options: tri-state, D_VDD, D_GND, R-divider, N-divider/2, analog LD, digital LD, or Reg6 readback (MUX=1100).
pins.requirements: Connect to MCU GPIO. For Reg6 readback: set MUX=1100, drive 32 CLK cycles with LE low then high, last 3 DATA bits = 110. VOH=VCC−0.4V, VOL=0.4V at 0.3mA. tMS=10ns setup, tMH=10ns hold.

pins.name: GND_SD
pins.description: Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to main PCB ground plane. Do NOT connect directly to exposed paddle (EP).

pins.name: VCC_SD
pins.description: Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
pins.requirements: Connect to 3.0–3.6V. Place 100nF + 1µF decoupling caps close to pin.

pins.name: EP
pins.description: Exposed Pad. Thermal and electrical ground pad. Must be soldered to PCB ground plane.
pins.requirements: Solder to PCB ground plane with via array (min 9 vias in 3×3 pattern). The seven separate GND_ signal pins each connect to the ground plane independently — do NOT route any GND_ pin directly to EP; the ground plane ties them together.

required_passives.placement: Each VCC_ pin (VCC_CP p6, VCC_PLL p10, VCC_RF p16, VCC_VCO p17, VCC_DIG p28, VCC_SD p32) to adjacent GND — one per pin
required_passives.reason: High-frequency supply decoupling. Dedicated via per cap to ground plane. Do not share vias.

required_passives.placement: Each VCC_ pin (×6) to GND — star routing from central VCC node
required_passives.reason: Bulk supply decoupling. Star topology minimises coupling between IC sections.
Mandatory VCO noise decoupling. Omitting causes severe phase noise degradation.
Mandatory VCO bias filter. Omitting causes VCO instability.

required_passives.placement: REF_IN (pin 29) — series AC-coupling to reference oscillator
required_passives.reason: REF_IN has internal DC bias at VCC_DIG/2. DC coupling will disturb bias and cause malfunction.
Sets CP current range. ICP=1.63V/RSET×(1+CP). 5.1kΩ gives 0.32mA–5.12mA range.

required_passives.placement: VCC_RF (pin 16) to RFOUTA_P (12), RFOUTA_N (13), RFOUTB_P (14), RFOUTB_N (15) — one choke per output pin
required_passives.reason: Open-collector RF output bias. Provides DC path to supply while passing RF. Required for all four output pins including unused ones.

required_passives.placement: Each active RF output to load; each unused RF output to GND as termination
required_passives.reason: RF load/termination. Unused outputs must be terminated: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND.

required_passives.value: Loop filter: C3=820pF (at CP_OUT), R3=250Ω, C1=0.012µF ∥ R2=120Ω, C2=0.1µF (at TUNE)
required_passives.reason: 3rd-order passive PLL loop filter. EV kit values for 40kHz bandwidth at fPFD=25MHz, fREF=50MHz.

application_circuits.name: Typical MAX2870 PLL Frequency Synthesiser (datasheet p.23)
application_circuits.description: Three separate LDOs supply VCC_RF, VCC_DIG, VCC_PLL for best performance. All six VCC_ pins decoupled with 100nF+1µF. REF_IN AC-coupled via 100nF to external reference oscillator. CP_OUT drives loop filter (C3=820pF shunt, R3=250Ω, C1=0.012µF∥R2=120Ω, C2=0.1µF) feeding TUNE. RFOUTA± and RFOUTB± biased via 27nH chokes from VCC_RF, terminated into 50Ω. NOISE_FILT, BIAS_FILT, REG each with 1µF to GND. RSET=5.1kΩ to GND. CE and RFOUT_EN pulled high to VCC_DIG via 10kΩ. CLK/DATA/LE from SPI master. LD and MUX_OUT to MCU GPIOs. EP soldered to ground plane with via array.

common_mistakes: GND_CP (8), GND_PLL (9), GND_RF (11), GND_VCO (18), GND_TUNE (21), GND_DIG (27), GND_SD (31) must NOT route directly to the exposed pad (EP) — each must connect independently to the board ground plane
TUNE (pin 20) must NOT connect directly to CP_OUT (pin 7) — TUNE connects to the output node of the loop filter network
After every power-up or CE de-assertion, registers must be written TWICE with ≥20ms pause: first pass enables device, second pass triggers VCO autoselection
Register programming order is mandatory: 5→4→3→2→1→0 (both times). Out-of-order writes produce undefined behaviour
Keep RFOUT disabled during the init sequence (Reg4 bits 4 and 8=0, RFOUT_EN pin low); enable with RFA_EN/RFB_EN only after the second complete programming pass
NOISE_FILT (19), BIAS_FILT (23), and REG (24) MUST each have a 1µF cap to GND — omitting any causes VCO instability and severely degraded phase noise
RF outputs are open-collector — each requires a 27nH RF choke to VCC_RF. Never connect directly to supply or GND
Unused RF outputs must still be terminated: 27nH choke to VCC_RF + 50Ω to GND. Do not leave floating
REF_IN must be AC-coupled — internal DC bias at VCC_DIG/2 is disturbed by direct DC connection
VCC_VCO (pin 17) decoupling caps must connect to the analog ground plane, not the digital ground plane
RSET (pin 22) must have a resistor (2.7kΩ–10kΩ) to GND — do not leave floating or tie directly to GND
Analog lock detect mode (LD=10 in Reg5) makes LD pin open-drain — a 10kΩ pull-up to VCC is required; missing pull-up means LD never goes high
For fractional-N mode set CPL=01 (Reg1 bits 30:29) and CPOC=0 (Reg1 bit31); for integer-N set CPL=00 and CPOC=1. Swapping degrades phase noise
VAS auto-select is not valid during and immediately after programming — wait for TUNE voltage to settle before trusting LD output
profile.notes: Reg6 (read-only): contains POR status (bit23), VTUNE ADC reading ADC[2:0] (bits 22:20), and active VCO sub-band V[5:0] (bits 8:3). Access via MUX_OUT when MUX[3:0]=1100. VCO manual selection (VAS_SHDN=1, Reg3 bit25) saves ~200µs lock time but requires a pre-built per-frequency VCO lookup table. Phase shift mode: set P=M×Δφ/360, enable CDM=10, then reset CDM=00. Low-spur mode: SDN=10 (mode1) or SDN=11 (mode2) in Reg2 bits 30:29.

passives.description: VCC_ supply decoupling — one per VCC_ pin (×6)
VCC_ bulk decoupling — one per VCC_ pin (×6)
RSET (pin 22) to GND — sets CP current
RF choke, VCC_RF to each RF output pin (×4)
Loop filter C3 — shunt at CP_OUT

sources.pad_center: 2.875mm from package center (inner edge 0.05mm inside 5mm body)
